heroHeadline: mRNA Technology Reshapes Medicine Beyond COVID
heroSubtitle: From the first COVID vaccine EUA in 335 days to Nobel Prize-winning science, cancer vaccine Phase 3 trials, and HIV/malaria programs — the mRNA platform is transforming how humanity fights disease across 20+ therapeutic areas.
footerNote: Data sourced from FDA, EMA, WHO, NIH, peer-reviewed publications (NEJM, Science, Nature), and institutional analyses. Timeline covers 2020-12-11 to present.
